query: bash -c "source ~/hermes-venv/bin/activate && cd /mnt/c/civibbs/pipeline/done_claude_opus2/ml_trae && python3 -c \"import sys; sys.path.insert(0, \"create_topo_storage_with_copies\"); from execute import execute; import tempfile, os, shutil; tmp = tempfile.mkdtemp(); r1 = execute({\"storage_id\": \"s1\", \"base_dir\": tmp, \"copy_count\": 2}); print(\"1st call:\", r1.get(\"created\")); r2 = execute({\"storage_id\": \"s1\", \"base_dir\": tmp, \"copy_count\": 2}); print(\"2nd call:\", r2.get(\"created\")); shutil.rmtree(tmp, True)\" 2>&1"
